ValidationRule.description: Created by PwC as part of SC-714
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Consumables', ISPICKVAL(Competitor_Type__c, 'Other'), ISCHANGED( StageName ), OR( ISPICKVAL(StageName , 'Closed Won'), ISPICKVAL(StageName , 'Closed Lost')), ISBLANK(Reason_Lost_Detail__c ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: If Competitor Type = Other, Please provide the name in the “Closed Reason Detail” field
